text: For TaAs single crystals, growth method: chemical vapor transport. Growth conditions: the source-zone temperature was 1050 C and the crystal-growth-zone temperature was 950 C; the growth duration was 336 h. DOI: 10.5555/e2e.taas.001.

For EuCr2As2 single crystals, growth method: flux growth. Growth conditions: the starting temperature was 1230 C and the final temperature was 1120 C; the growth duration was 55 h. DOI: 10.5555/e2e.eucr2as2.001.

For Mn3Ge single crystals, growth method: flux growth. Growth conditions: the starting temperature was 950 C and the final temperature was 650 C; the growth duration was 170 h. DOI: 10.5555/e2e.mn3ge.001.
For MnTe2 single crystals, growth method: chemical vapor transport. Growth conditions: the growth duration was 168 h. DOI: 10.5555/e2e.mnte2.001.

For ZnIn2S4 single crystals, growth method: chemical vapor transport. Growth conditions: the source-zone temperature was 900 C and the crystal-growth-zone temperature was 800 C; the growth duration was 168 h. DOI: 10.5555/e2e.znin2s4.001.
